predictedBugs: Sequence index out of bounds if agent-delegation validateAgentSequence receives empty array — handled with safe loop guard
Delegation graph circular reference via specialist roles — BFS path finder prevents infinite loop but could return suboptimal path
Engine executeTransition creates handoff artifact even when currentAgent matches transition.agent — handled with state.currentAgent !== role guard
edgeCases: Empty decisions/files/blockers arrays in handoff artifact — should still produce valid YAML without those keys present
Agent transition from null currentAgent (initial state) — should treat as no previous agent and proceed
Backward compatibility of EngineState serialization — state files without currentAgent/previousAgent fields load with defaults
